text.title: Agent Architectures (Memory + Tools + Planning + Reflection) Output Contract
text.summary: JSON-schema output contract the subagent applying agent-architectures must produce. Required fields, forbidden patterns, allowed transformations, plus valid + invalid worked examples.

section.title: Output schema (JSON Schema draft-07)

forbidden.pattern: No raw `while True:` loop without iteration cap.
No tool dispatch without schema validation.
No memory grow path without summarization or eviction.
No agent without OTel spans per state transition.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Order arrays deterministically by their natural key (slug, id, name) before serialising.
Round numeric values to 2 decimal places when serialising.

example.note: Missing the first required field and `forbidden_seen` is non-empty — schema rejects both.

list.item: All required fields present and non-null.
